pages.title: Explorer's Codex
pages.text: A spellbook tuned for travel and reconnaissance. It comes preloaded with utility spells that help with movement, scouting, and staying aware of your surroundings while exploring.

pages.title: Sample Role
pages.text: This entry is the smallest sample of a standalone Patchouli book with an `Items` category and a concrete child entry beneath it. More equipment or spell entries can be added beside it later.
